scripts.setup: node -e "const p = process.platform; const cp = require('child_process'); const cmd = p === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File bootstrap.ps1' : 'bash bootstrap.sh'; cp.execSync(cmd, { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.setup:backend: node -e "const p = process.platform; const cp = require('child_process'); cp.execSync(p === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File bootstrap.ps1 -Only backend' : 'bash bootstrap.sh --only backend', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.setup:frontend: node -e "const p = process.platform; const cp = require('child_process'); cp.execSync(p === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File bootstrap.ps1 -Only frontend' : 'bash bootstrap.sh --only frontend', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.setup:microservice: node -e "const p = process.platform; const cp = require('child_process'); cp.execSync(p === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File bootstrap.ps1 -Only microservice' : 'bash bootstrap.sh --only microservice', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
